name: dropdown-menu
title: Dropdown Menu
description: A highly customizable neo-brutalist Dropdown Menu component built with Brutx design tokens for Vue 3.

files.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import {
    DropdownMenuPortal as DropdownMenuPortalPrimitive,
    DropdownMenuContent as DropdownMenuContentPrimitive,
} from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { dropdownMenuContentVariants } from './dropdown-menu-variants'

const DEFAULT_SIDE_OFFSET = 6

interface DropdownMenuContentProps {
    sideOffset?: number
    class?: string
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<DropdownMenuContentProps>(), {
    sideOffset: DEFAULT_SIDE_OFFSET,
    class: undefined,
})

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(dropdownMenuContentVariants(), props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <DropdownMenuPortalPrimitive>
        <DropdownMenuContentPrimitive :side-offset="sideOffset" :class="classes">
            <slot />
        </DropdownMenuContentPrimitive>
    </DropdownMenuPortalPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { DropdownMenuItem as DropdownMenuItemPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { dropdownMenuItemVariants } from './dropdown-menu-variants'

interface DropdownMenuItemProps {
    inset?: boolean
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<DropdownMenuItemProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(dropdownMenuItemVariants(), props.inset && 'pl-8', props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <DropdownMenuItemPrimitive :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </DropdownMenuItemPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { DropdownMenuLabel as DropdownMenuLabelPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface DropdownMenuLabelProps {
    inset?: boolean
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<DropdownMenuLabelProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(
        'px-3 py-2 text-sm font-black tracking-wide',
        props.inset && 'pl-8',
        props.class
    )
)
</script>

<template>
    <DropdownMenuLabelPrimitive :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </DropdownMenuLabelPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { DropdownMenuSeparator as DropdownMenuSeparatorPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface DropdownMenuSeparatorProps {
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<DropdownMenuSeparatorProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn('-mx-1 my-1 h-[3px] bg-brutal-fg', props.class)
)
</script>

<template>
    <DropdownMenuSeparatorPrimitive :class="classes" />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { DropdownMenuSubContent as DropdownMenuSubContentPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

interface DropdownMenuSubContentProps {
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<DropdownMenuSubContentProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(
        'z-50 min-w-[8rem] overflow-hidden p-1',
        'bg-brutal-bg text-brutal-fg border-3 border-brutal shadow-brutal rounded-brutal',
        'data-[state=open]:animate-in data-[state=closed]:animate-out',
        'data-[state=closed]:fade-out-0 data-[state=open]:fade-in-0',
        'data-[state=closed]:zoom-out-95 data-[state=open]:zoom-in-95',
        'data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2',
        'data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2',
        'data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2',
        'data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2',
        props.class
    )
)
</script>

<template>
    <DropdownMenuSubContentPrimitive :class="classes">
        <slot />
    </DropdownMenuSubContentPrimitive>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed } from 'vue'
import { DropdownMenuSubTrigger as DropdownMenuSubTriggerPrimitive } from 'reka-ui'
import { ChevronRight } from '@lucide/vue'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'
import { dropdownMenuItemVariants } from './dropdown-menu-variants'

interface DropdownMenuSubTriggerProps {
    inset?: boolean
    class?: string
}

const props = defineProps<DropdownMenuSubTriggerProps>()

const classes = computed(() =>
    cn(
        dropdownMenuItemVariants(),
        'data-[state=open]:bg-brutal-accent data-[state=open]:text-brutal-fg',
        props.inset && 'pl-8',
        props.class
    )
)
</script>

<template>
    <DropdownMenuSubTriggerPrimitive :class="classes">
        <slot />
        <ChevronRight class="ml-auto h-4 w-4 stroke-[3]" />
    </DropdownMenuSubTriggerPrimitive>
</template>
